1.4.11-non-text-contrast.remarks: Search box border (#e5e8e8, 1.23:1) does not need 3:1 contrast because the control is identifiable via magnifying glass icon, placeholder text, and prominent positioning. Focus indicator uses primary (#126ce0) at 4.94:1.
Checkboxes use neutral-dark (#626971) border at 5.56:1. Selected state uses primary bg at 4.94:1. All pass 3:1.
Number input fields use border-neutral (#e5e8e8) at 1.23:1 vs white, failing 3:1 for the input boundary. Focus indicator passes. See KIT-5807.
Page buttons contain visible text numbers. Selected state border uses primary (#126ce0) at 4.94:1.

Active stars (#f6ce3c) at 1.52:1 and inactive stars (#e5e8e8) at 1.23:1 both fail 3:1 against white. Stars are graphical objects required for understanding. Customizable via CSS custom properties. See KIT-5808.
Dropdown button contains visible text label. Border is supplementary for identification.
